programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: When Jan visits the office to conduct a 'women in the workplace' seminar with the female Dunder Mifflin employees, Michael takes the guys down to the warehouse for some 'male bonding.'

programme.title: The Office: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: When Michael visits Dunder Mifflin corporate headquarters in New York on Valentine's Day, both he and Jan are in for a surprise. Meanwhile back in Scranton, the office staff celebrates Valentine's Day grade school style.

programme.title: The Office: Dwight's Speech
programme.desc: Dunder Mifflin salesman of the year Dwight Schrute must somehow conquer his fear of public speaking before the big convention and turns for help to the worst possible teacher, Michael. As Pam becomes consumed in her wedding plans, Jim plans his escape.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: January 28, 2021
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: The Office: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Michael is surprised when he strikes up a friendship with the five-year-old daughter of his sworn enemy, Toby, on Take Your Daughter to Work Day.

programme.title: South Park: Jared Has Aides
programme.desc: As the country becomes obsessed with a popular program for losing weight, the boys see an opportunity to become sponsored by a local restaurant.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: January 28, 2021
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?
programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with a 'bunch of Melvins.' The ATF believes everyone in the house to be part of a cult, and Stan and the 'Angels' must save the day.

programme.title: South Park: Jewbilee
programme.desc: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids, where they make various arts and crafts as tribute to the great and powerful Moses.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Killer in High Heels
programme.desc: Maura becomes the key suspect in a homicide case when her date turns up dead and Maura can't remember the evening. Jane struggles between protecting her friend and doing her job.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dance With the Devil
programme.desc: Maura and Jane unravel a shocking secret about Paddy and Hope that affects them all. Korsak opens up about Cavanaugh's tragic past.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: But I Am a Good Girl
programme.desc: TJ's christening turns grim when a body is discovered in the church. Jane almost abuses her power in order to protect Tommy when Lydia's fiancé threatens to take custody of TJ.

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: We're exploring leading companies who are changing the careers and lives of military veterans across the country.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Time Has Come Today
programme.desc: The doctors of Seattle Grace help Izzie cope with the loss of her fiancé, Denny, and her decision to quit the internship program. Meredith must decide what the future holds after her hospital liaison with Derek.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Am a Tree
programme.desc: While Cristina meets Burke's parents, the interns campaign, under the most awkward circumstances, for Izzie's reinstatement to the surgical intern program. Meanwhile, Addison takes a break from her hospital duties as a patient live out her last days.

programme.title: The Closer: Lover's Leap
programme.desc: A car belonging to a Department of Homeland Security employee is found wrecked at the bottom of Mulholland Drive. Priority Homicide is brought in to uncover the details surrounding the driver's death, but the investigation leads Brenda close to home.

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson's investigation into a famous Hollywood divorce attorney found floating in his swimming pool is under heavy scrutiny. Meanwhile, Fritz and Brenda are trying to consolidate their bills, but Brenda discovers a secret.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Four of a Kind
programme.desc: Four wealthy one percenters are left for dead outside a hospital emergency room in a twisty- curvy murder that leads through an impossible list of suspects.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Blackout
programme.desc: Jack Raydor is back again, defending a man who is attempting to withdraw a confession in the murder of his wife. A last-second video purporting to provide the defendant with an alibi alerts the Major Crimes team to the possibility of a conspiracy.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Reality Check
programme.desc: Sharon and the team investigate a murder during the taping of a reality competition show pitting married couples against each other. The case has a profound effect on Sanchez, bringing back memories of his late wife.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Somebody's Watching Me
programme.desc: A viral video of Jane's bad day potentially jeopardizes her career and reputation. Meanwhile, the squad rushes to solve a puzzling murder case involving a conspiracy theorist.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Bombs and Betrayal
programme.desc: Tucson, Arizona society is blown away when a car bomb explodes outside of an exclusive country club, but when the case goes cold, will investigators be able to find their suspect?

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Death of the Socialite
programme.desc: When an Atlanta socialite is gunned down in her foyer, the search for her murderer leads investigators across the world.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Murder in the Mansion
programme.desc: An IT entrepreneur in Keller, Texas is killed in a deadly home invasion, but the evidence on the scene and his widow's account of the attack aren't adding up.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Spoiled to Death
programme.desc: A wealthy Colorado furrier makes headlines after her ex-boyfriend is gunned down.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Fatal Fortune
programme.desc: While an Austin, Texas media mogul clings to life after a shotgun blast to the stomach, his wife's history of psychiatric institutionalization pique's investigators interest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: BattleBots: Battle of the Undefeated
programme.desc: Sparks fly round the BattleBox as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in a deadly battle of horizontal spinners. Undefeated Malice and MadCatter duke it out while Uppercut takes on SawBlaze in an explosive main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Slick-driving Whiplash looks to get its championship aspirations back on track against Gruff's menacing flamethrowers. Underdog Rusty attempts to upset veteran Beta and Hypershock locks horns with Mammoth in a gear-grinding main-event showdown.

programme.title: BattleBots: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Whiplash attempts to stage a comeback against Gruff's flamethrowers and Underdog Rusty attempts an upset with veteran Beta. Hypershock does battle with Mammoth in a gear-grinding main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Hit the Jackpot!
programme.desc: Desperate to avoid a winless season, Huge faces Kraken. It's veteran vs. rookie as Lock-Jaw fights Jackpot, and only one can go 3-0. Tournament favorite Tombstone protects his crown against a bot that was built to dethrone him: Skorpios!

programme.title: BattleBots: Don't FLIP OUT!
programme.desc: BattleBots Champion Bite Force squares off against famed bot Yeti, while another legendary builder returns to the competition with a brand-new epic bot.

programme.title: BattleBots: Hit the Jackpot!
programme.desc: Desperate to avoid a winless season, Huge faces Kraken. It's veteran vs. rookie as Lock-Jaw fights Jackpot, and only one can go 3-0. Tournament favorite Tombstone protects his crown against a bot that was built to dethrone him: Skorpios!

programme.title: BattleBots: Don't FLIP OUT!
programme.desc: BattleBots Champion Bite Force squares off against famed bot Yeti, while another legendary builder returns to the competition with a brand-new epic bot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rise 'n Shine!
programme.desc: Tim, Tickle and a few rookies are all going for a piece of a $100 million dollar jackpot. A new lawman in town has everyone walking on shells.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Passing the Torch
programme.desc: As Warden Richards reminisces on his career during the last day on the job, he races to rescue a cow being attacked by a pack of hunting dogs. At the academy, new recruits wrangle a gator, while anglers are caught illegally fishing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Reckless Behavior
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property. Then, stray bullets are shot into a horse owner's home, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chasing a Dead Man
programme.desc: In Llano County, a jet skier's life is spared after an explosion on the water. When a man fakes his own death, Warden Herchman and Stapleton join forces to track him down, and a man is found trespassing while fishing.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Parker returns to the Klondike and records the biggest gold haul of his career. Tony travels deep into the wilderness to resurrect of a gold-catching monster. Rick's forced to find better ground. Fred makes a big change to get on the gold.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Alligator Feet
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent faces an eight-hour surgery to repair the worst case of dancer's feet she's ever seen. A woman's club feet give Dr. Schaeffer a shocking surprise when he removes her shoes.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Bloomin' Bunions
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent's patient has feet that are so crooked her toes don't touch the floor, and Dr. Schaeffer meets a woman with behemoth bunions. Rachel has a toe crawling up her foot, and Dr. Haller has to get it back in line.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Belly Dancer Mystery
programme.desc: A belly dancer collapses while working at a hookah bar. An ER doctor must quickly learn a new skill to mend an elderly patient and bring his bickering family together. A 6-year-old girl is having seizures and no one knows what the cause is.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Epi
programme.desc: A patient arrives with paralysis in her legs, which spreads up to her arms. An ATV crushes a boy and the hospital doesn't have the right tools to help him. A doctor accidentally injects herself with epinephrine.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rattled
programme.desc: A snake bite victim may die in the ER when life-saving anti-venom isn't available; a mother is near death after having a C-section and doctors are torn over treatment options.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Campstove Stuffing
programme.desc: A new doctor must stand up to a superior who wants to send his wife into surgery with undiagnosed rectal bleeding. A man comes into the ER with a surprising body part stuck inside a camping stove. A 6-year-old boy has a rare massive stroke.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Deadly Sore Throat
programme.desc: A wheezing woman comes to the ER with a difficult-to-diagnose problem and a very angry husband; a grown man suddenly begins acting like a child; a birthday party goes bad as the whole family comes to the ER deathly ill.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Girlfriend, Wife, Stroke!
programme.desc: A stroke patient watches speechless and horrified as his wife and two girlfriends fight over him. Army doctors in Iraq try to save the lives of soldiers who lost limbs in an IED explosion. A child's play bite turns deadly for a recent transplant patient.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rattled
programme.desc: A snake bite victim may die in the ER when life-saving anti-venom isn't available; a mother is near death after having a C-section and doctors are torn over treatment options.

programme.desc: A wheezing woman comes to the ER with a difficult-to-diagnose problem and a very angry husband; a grown man suddenly begins acting like a child; a birthday party goes bad as the whole family comes to the ER deathly ill.

programme.desc: A stroke patient watches speechless and horrified as his wife and two girlfriends fight over him. Army doctors in Iraq try to save the lives of soldiers who lost limbs in an IED explosion. A child's play bite turns deadly for a recent transplant patient.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: The Open Road
programme.desc: Lydia confides in Kim about her secret crush. Ethan jets off to Los Angeles to meet up with Olivia for a much-needed vacation away from Cairo, Georgia. Then, Lydia is in for some surprises when she joins Moriah for a girls' night.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: My Everything
programme.desc: Ethan and Olivia continue their California adventure and veer into an unexpected tantric experience. Kim, Barry, Micah, Moriah and the younger children unite for a tender remembrance of their late son and brother, Joshua.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We Don't Do Anything Normal
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa's dress vision is simple: it must show off her muscles. Shay may lose his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget. Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is My Fiancé...and This Is His Wife!
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé - and his wife. Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the latest runway. Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Divided We Move
programme.desc: The Browns go to Flagstaff to look at properties and they are split over which one to buy. Robyn and Christine prefer one while Meri and Kody another, in a surprising turn of events, Janelle is used as the tie-breaker.

programme.title: The 685-lb Teen

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bro-Down Showdown
programme.desc: Patrick and Terence Feury duke it out for the nod of approval from Bryan and Michael Voltaggio.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Midwest Swing
programme.desc: Veggie master Daniel Angerer and barbeque guru Mike Johnson have been waiting for a second shot at Bobby Flay. Katie Lee and Daphne Oz determine who gets the chance to face Bobby again.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Up In Smoke!
programme.desc: Chef Kamal Rose and Shannon Bard compete for a chance to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Surf and Turf
programme.desc: Chefs Alex Guarnaschelli and Anne Burrell have their eyes on the prize - taking down Bobby Flay in his own arena. Surf chef Raphael Lunetta and cowboy chef Jake Gandolfo bring the heat before the winner takes on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Smile Now, Cry Later
programme.desc: Comedian Judah Friedlander and Chef Michael Symon team up for a battle - finding a competitor to beat Bobby Flay. They will be watching Jason Fullilove duke it out against Billy Olivia.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Strike While the Iron's Hot
programme.desc: For chefs Amanda Freitag and Geoffrey Zakarian, there's no doubt who should win and it's not Bobby. It will be need to be decided between chef Tim Freeman and the Boston native Nookie Postal to see who will go against the Iron Chef.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Breaking Food News
programme.desc: Katie Couric and Bobby Flay's best friend Michael Symon teams up to vet the chef who is going to take on Bobby in round two. It's up to Israeli chef Michael Ginor and Charlotte, S.C., darling Alyssa Gorelick to prove they have it.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Blondes Have More Fun
programme.desc: Sara Haines tries to keep the winning streak alive when she teams up with Food Network's Anne Burrell to try to bring Bobby Flay down. Chefs Jonathan Dearden and Scott Drewno go head-to-head for a shot at Bobby's crown.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ready, Set, Grill!
programme.desc: The BBQ princess, Leslie Roark Scott, goes up against the queen of pork, Jess DeSham Timmons, for a chance to grill Bobby Flay.

programme.desc: Legendary Chef Ina Garten brings along Tony Award-winning Laura Benanti to steal Bobby Flay's spotlight.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Revenge Is Best Served Bold
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's former co-worker Leia Gaccione and Asian expert Tony Nguyen are back for more, returning to the arena for a second chance to take Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Power of Jane
programme.desc: Actress Jane Krakowski teams up with Chef Michael Symon to steal Bobby Flay's spotlight. They bring in no-nonsense chefs Attila Bollok from Los Angeles and Matthew Spinner from Cleveland to give Bobby an early curtain call.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ladies Night
programme.desc: Katie Lee and Laura Vitale are dressed to kill Bobby Flay's record. It's between Jennifer Jasinski and Eric Levine to face off for the coveted chance to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Dark Horses Still Kick
programme.desc: Food truck owner Ed Hardy and Indian chef Kunal Lamba are here to prove there's more than meets the eye. Bobby Flay's friends, actress Debi Mazar and chef Geoffrey Zakarian, are praying that one of these chefs can help break their own losing streaks.

programme.desc: Katie Lee and Marcus Samuelsson hold nothing back as they aim to get Bobby beat. They take no chances with Canada's Alida Solomon and Italian Pasquale Cozzolino.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Watery Grave

programme.desc: Will gets caught up in a sorority prank that is meant to teach him to respect women.

programme.desc: A teenage human-vampire hybrid trains at a special school to protect the Moroi: a line of peaceful, mortal vampires, of which her best friend is one. Aware of a growing threat within the Academy, the two plan to make their escape.

programme.desc: After being betrayed by Wesker, Alice is the only survivor of a battle against the undead. She discovers that Umbrella is gathering its forces for a final strike, and she returns to Raccoon City to stop them. Alice fights for humanity one last time.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fish Out of Water

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big House, Big Budget

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Small House, Big Problems

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Far Out Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are lured to North Hollywood, CA, by a 1930s Spanish home. They want to appeal to trendy Los Angeles buyers by preserving the historic architecture, but the home's inconvenient distance causes unexpected issues during renovations.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Better Be Quick
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take out an expensive loan to flip a house in Fountain Valley, CA. A tight timeline pressures them to flip the house quickly.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on one of their biggest projects to date in Anaheim Hills, California, but modernizing this 90's mansion will cost them a fortune. If they don't get the design just right, it could jeopardize the profit and their big investment.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flew the Coop
programme.desc: From dirty carpets to rotten food, Tarek and Christina thought they had seen the worst of this house in Cerritos, California. After finding a bird cage with years of mess, they struggle to see past the trash and transform this home into a profitable flip.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Scorpion

programme.title: Shattered: Driftwood Killer
programme.desc: 1994. New Castle, DE. A deadly fire claims what appears to be an innocent victim, leaving a woman shaken by her sister's death... a detective learns the fire is not an accident - but a murder... and a man discovers the true nature of his brother.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Drowning in Tears
programme.desc: When Tim meets Maryann at a Catholic mixer, it's a match made in heaven. But while the future looks bright, a dark cloud gathers on the horizon the shadow of Tim's ex-wife. Despite the best intentions, everyone knows that raising a family can be murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Coed Killer
programme.desc: Angela Samota is every coed's dream come true. She's smart, beautiful, and always the epicenter of every room she enters - but one day she's noticed by the wrong person, and it leads to her ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Two Men and A Slaying
programme.desc: A man rents out a room to an old buddy, but their contrasting living habits create chaos in the house. Tiny arguments turn into petty crimes, resulting in a vicious fight that turns deadly.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Betrayed: Coed Killer
programme.desc: Angela Samota is every coed's dream come true. She's smart, beautiful, and always the epicenter of every room she enters - but one day she's noticed by the wrong person, and it leads to her ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Two Men and A Slaying
programme.desc: A man rents out a room to an old buddy, but their contrasting living habits create chaos in the house. Tiny arguments turn into petty crimes, resulting in a vicious fight that turns deadly.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Drowning in Tears
programme.desc: When Tim meets Maryann at a Catholic mixer, it's a match made in heaven. But while the future looks bright, a dark cloud gathers on the horizon the shadow of Tim's ex-wife. Despite the best intentions, everyone knows that raising a family can be murder.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: The Ecstasy and the Agony
programme.desc: Beautiful Latvian Yekaterina Petrov's mother dies and she loses herself in the glitzy Miami nightclub scene. When she meets Mark, a handsome club promoter, the two set off on a rocky romance fueled by sex, drugs and violence, making front page news.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: After two failed relationships Michelle Covington is swept off her feet by a former high school classmate. But excessive drinking makes him abusive. The couple gets in a nasty fight with the boyfriend in danger of bleeding to death from a stab wound.

programme.title: Love Kills: Matchmaker to Murder
programme.desc: When Damarius and his girlfriend Alyssa find out she's pregnant, the couple's parents are furious. The friction culminates in a terrible tragedy, resulting the arrest of Damarius. Weeks later, a surprising twist will reveal the couple's darkest secret.

programme.title: Love Kills: Sheltered to Shackles
programme.desc: Victoria comes from a good family but can't help falling for Raymon, a bad boy from the streets. She quickly falls into a life of crime with him, breaking into homes and cars. When the couple ups the ante to armed robbery, their lives are changed forever.

programme.title: Guilty Rich: Deadly Delusions
programme.desc: Known for his eccentricities and generosity, John Du Pont is used to having it all. But the Olympic wrestling team owner battles private demons... and his money and power stand in the way of an unspeakable tragedy.

programme.title: Guilty Rich: The Millionaire an the Model
programme.desc: An aspiring model finds love and a runway to success in her vitamin tycoon husband. But behind the money and the make-up is an ugly truth... and when the marriage fails, with millions at stake, each wants the other out of the picture - forever.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Hot for Teacher
programme.desc: A seductive high school teacher began a romance with a 15-year-old student, luring him with false allegations of abuse by her husband.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Wine
programme.desc: When Nancy Lyon mysteriously died in hospital, suspicions fell on her husband, but other suspects were revealed including her brother.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: A Deadly Education
programme.desc: Facades are shed to reveal jealousy and vengeance that result in murder within a family.

programme.title: Evil Kin: Like Father, Like Sons
programme.desc: For the Woodman family, nothing seems too rich for their blood. But sometimes, having everything is never enough. When greed, jealousy and quest for power threaten their lavish lifestyle, a vicious plot unfolds to reveal an evil seeking vengeance.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: Identical twins Yvette and Doris Gay are a close-knit pair, but when they meet Renwick Gibbs, their quiet duo transforms into a dangerous threesome. And soon they with devise a murderous scheme that will change one innocent family's life forever.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Murder at the House of God
programme.desc: In January 2014, Nathan and Krystal Maddox are gunned down just seconds after leaving a remote Texan church. The brutal double murder leaves a close-knit community traumatized and looking for answers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Wild Bill: Marskman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own, by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: From the ashes of the Confederacy rises a bold rebel outlaw determined to get rich and get even. Jesse James is seen by many as a modern day Robin Hood, a Southern gentleman avenging the efforts of Northern businessmen to exploit his territory.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Winner, Winner, Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Heading back to his Southern roots, Eddie Jackson is on the hunt for the best chicken dinners. Taking comfort food to the next level, these favorite dishes are trashy, messy and spicy. Winner, winner, it's chicken for dinner!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Crazy for Crunch
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson takes a deep dive into some deep-fried dishes that are sure to satisfy the craving for crunch. These creations have crunchy coatings so crispy that you have to see it to believe it.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Goa
programme.desc: Andrew explores the local cuisine of Goa, a former Portuguese colony in western India.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the elaborate feasts, home-cooked comfort food, sushi and confections of Kyoto, Japan. From the artistic multi-course dining experience to the everyday humble comfort foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Undiscovered Hawaii
programme.desc: Andrew wants to find out what Hawaiians really like to eat. From dried octopus bile sac to crispy pork intestine, Andrew gets a taste of Hawaii's other side.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern finds that you can still get a taste of the Wild West in the food of Denver, offering a goldmine of flavours from the past and present.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana

programme.desc: A former CIA assassin from an experimental top-secret program resorts to his training when he is framed for a botched CIA operation.

programme.title: Bones: The Jewel in the Crown

programme.title: Bones: The Nightmare in the Nightmare

programme.desc: Charlie Bucket lives in a tiny house with his parents and grandparents, and would like nothing more than to win a tour of Willy Wonka's chocolate factory. The adventure begins when he miraculously finds the last golden ticket in a chocolate bar.

programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the copycat murder of an unsolved case from 150 years ago that spawned a legendary New Orleans ghost story.

programme.title: Movie: Walking Tall
programme.desc: This film recounts the story of real-life Tennessee sheriff Buford Pusser who won fame by cleaning up his backwoods county by trying to rid the town of gambling and moonshine rings.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: When her high school boyfriend, a superstar baseball player, returns to town, a single-parent finds the inspiration to reinvent her struggling diner and revisits the past to find something even better for the future.

programme.title: Movie: Taking a Shot at Love
programme.desc: A professional dancer uses ballet to help a hockey player get back in the game.

programme.title: Movie: Snow Bride
programme.desc: A reporter pretends to be the girlfriend of the son of a famous politician to help him save face over Christmas. She becomes torn between exposing newsworthy scoops about the famous family and trusting that she's falling in love for real.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Engagement
programme.desc: Blanche announces that Harry has proposed leaving Rose worried about where she will live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?
programme.desc: Dorothy invites her ex-husband Stan to their daughter's wedding so she can get revenge.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose the Prude
programme.desc: Rose has qualms about sharing her stateroom on an upcoming cruise with a man she likes.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Transplant
programme.desc: Blanche has to make a life-altering decision when the sister she hates needs a kidney.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle
programme.desc: A doctor Dorothy dates also gets Blanche's pulse racing, until he makes a pass at her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: On Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's undisciplined 14-year-old grandson's visit gives new meaning to generation gap.

programme.title: Frasier: The Bad Son
programme.desc: Martin takes a tour of a senior citizens' home so that Frasier can ask the manager out.

programme.title: Frasier: The Great Crane Robbery
programme.desc: Frasier's new boss buys a condo in his building and copies Frasier's exact décor scheme.

programme.title: Frasier: Taking Liberties
programme.desc: Frasier leaps to hire a newly available butler who spoils everyone in the household.

programme.title: Frasier: Legal, Tender, Love and Care
programme.desc: Frasier begins to suspect that his defense attorney is unfairly running up his bill.

programme.title: Frasier: The New Friend
programme.desc: Frasier tries to keep his friendship with Roz's charming ex-boyfriend a secret from her.

programme.title: Frasier: Mary Christmas
programme.desc: Frasier learns that his protégé, Dr. Mary, will co-host the Christmas parade with him.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier's Edge
programme.desc: Frasier suffers the first pangs of a sudden mid-life crisis and consults a psychologist.

programme.title: Frasier: Cranes Unplugged
programme.desc: Frasier cannot adjust to his son's indifferent attitude and new interest in girls.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition
programme.desc: Sophia and Rose compete against Dorothy and Blanche in a bowling tournament.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: Movie: Royally Ever After
programme.desc: Following a proposal, a man reveals he is the prince of a small country called St. Ives, and he needs his disapproving parents' blessing in order to marry.

programme.title: Movie: The Art of Us
programme.desc: A woman tries to land a position at Boston Art College and counts on curating a big art gallery at the university to do so. When she loses her showcase artist and has no one else, she turns to her recently-hired dog walker who is a skilled painter.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A woman burned by a boyfriend on New Year’s escapes on a ski getaway and is snowed in with a handsome entrepreneur.

programme.title: Movie: Unleashing Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A woman shows her dog in a fancy New York dog show and the judge comes off as rude and aristocratic. A chain of misunderstanding unfolds during the competition, complicating the attraction they have for one another.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Office: Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Cabin
programme.desc: Looking for privacy, Johnny and Moira take the Mayor up on his offer of using his cabin for a night. Alexis and David use the opportunity to throw a party.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Wine and Roses
programme.desc: Moira is hired as the spokesperson for a local winery. Meanwhile, Alexis gets a little too close to Mutt while David struggles with a mysterious health problem.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Turkey Shoot
programme.desc: David goes on a turkey hunt with some townies. Meanwhile, Jocelyn takes Moira on a 'relaxing' spa day while Alexis meets the new love of her life, Ted the veterinarian.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Allez Vous
programme.desc: Moira and David try to earn money by selling cosmetics to the locals while Johnny heads to Elmdale in hopes of collecting unemployment insurance.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Carl's Funeral
programme.desc: Johnny reluctantly agrees to speak at the funeral of a local man he doesn't really know. Alexis struggles with her new boyfriend's love of animals.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Honeymoon
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira attend Roland's annual Hawaiian bash. Alexis and Ted throw a couple's dinner party while David and Stevie's relationship heats up.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: Seriously Funny
programme.desc: Kevin's getting older and wiser, and now it's time to get serious, seriously funny, that is.

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The kids desperately want to bring an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Cow
programme.desc: Cartman's latest prank brings peace to the world.

programme.title: South Park: Douche and a Danish
programme.desc: Giant Douche wants out of the Presidential race.

programme.title: South Park: Fort Collins
programme.desc: An entire city in Colorado gets hacked. Gerald and Cartman may lose everything when their complete history of internet activity becomes public.

programme.title: South Park: Oh, Jeez
programme.desc: Gerald comes face-to-face with the Troll Hunter.

programme.title: South Park: White People Renovating Houses
programme.desc: Randy comes to grips with what it means to be white in today's society.

programme.title: South Park: Go Fund Yourself
programme.desc: The boys name their new start-up company 'The Washington Redskins.'

programme.title: South Park: Franchise Prequel
programme.desc: Facebook is the ultimate weapon for Professor Chaos.

programme.title: South Park: Crippled Summer
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy head off to summer camp with all their handi-capable friends. When one of the camp counsellors, Towelie, falls off the wagon, the boys stage an intervention.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Pawnee-Eagleton Tip Off Classic
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben visit Eagleton to discuss financial matters with a city counsellor. Ann takes April to vet school orientation.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Dopplegangers
programme.desc: Leslie pairs up the Pawnee Parks employees with their Eagleton counterparts. Ben and Chris reunited for an accounting project.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Gin It Up!
programme.desc: Leslie tries to calm a minor scandal that gets blown out of proportion. Tom tries to impress a new love interest.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Filibuster
programme.desc: Leslie throws Ben a birthday bash but is forced to leave early for an emergency filibuster. Tom tries to make some memories with his new girlfriend.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: All for One
programme.desc: A popular high school teacher is killed in a hit and run that is clearly no accident. The squad works to solve the case, but Jane is preoccupied with Lt. Martinez's apparent favouritism towards his own drug unit.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: Frankie Jr. is brought in to help with a gruesome murder case involving a youth hockey league. Frustrated with Hope, Cailin asks to stay with Maura but quickly learns that living with a teenager requires skills she does not have.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: No One Mourns the Wicked
programme.desc: Jane faces her memories when she and Maura present the case of serial killer Charles Hoyt at a symposium. As they begin their simulation of the investigation, a horrifying discovery leads to a game of cat and mouse with a new serial killer.

programme.title: Little Women: Atlanta: Burying the Hatchet With Ms. Ratchet
programme.desc: Abira’s drunken outburst at the Final Cut causes friction between all the Little Women and Minnie must choose between her clients Abira and The Twinz. Emily gives birth to her son in an emergency C-section.

programme.title: Little Women: Atlanta: Kick-off Special
programme.desc: The ladies of Little Women: Atlanta reunite with host Terra Jole, to take a look back at the previous five seasons. Old rivalries ignite and shocking confessions come to light as the girls answer tough questions about their relationships.

programme.title: Little Women: Atlanta: No Respect for the Queen
programme.desc: Monie makes her return to Atlanta looking for support and a place to stay, but Ms. Juicy has other ideas. When Abira feels slighted by the Twins, their long standing feud erupts into all out chaos, catching the rest of the girls in the crossfire.

programme.title: Movie: How Stella Got Her Groove Back
programme.desc: A successful stockbroker begins a love affair with a younger man while on vacation.

programme.title: Movie: Just Go With It
programme.desc: To cover up a lie he told his girlfriend, a plastic surgeon convinces his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife.

programme.title: Movie: Enough
programme.desc: A working class woman finds her circumstances greatly improved after marrying a wealthy contractor. After learning of his abusive tendencies, she goes on the run and trains herself to fight back.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.
