programme.title: How It Really Happened: What Killed Heath Ledger?
programme.desc: Whether Heath Ledger's immersion into the role of 'The Joker' impacted his personal life and strange drawings and clues found in his apartment are investigated.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Hundreds of people vanished without a trace in the mid 1970s, leaving their families was distraught and wondering about them for decades. In March 1997, shocking news of a mysterious religious group made world headlines.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Parker lands his biggest haul of his career and Tony resurrects a gold-catching monster in the wilderness. Rick searches for better ground and Fred makes a big change for big gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Frenemies
programme.desc: Parker brokers a deal with Tony to open a new cut on the Indian River. Tony's new trommel build gets derailed when a fire breaks out. Fred's greenhorn crew steps up to keep the Colonel running and on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Resurrecting Monsters
programme.desc: Parker cleans out the gold-rich Promiseland and risks losing Sluicifer during a move to new ground. The Beets try to supercharge their season with Tony's massive new trommel. Rick turns back to Monster Red in hopes of a record season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Got Your Six
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Tony cleans up with old timer's lost gold, Fred's team begins to crack and Rick leaves his crew to keep his season on track.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Welcome Home, d+ Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Get a sneak peek of the first episode of the new series from Chip and Joanna Gaines, streaming now on discovery+.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Freddy to the Rescue
programme.desc: Parker's crew tallies up all the gold from the Last Cut and rushes to mine out the Airstrip Cut. Freddy and Juan answer an SOS call from Fred Lewis. Tony drains a massive holding pond to get his operation back up and running.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Trespassers

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Training Day
programme.desc: What does Joe do every morning before work? And where was Q employed before becoming a fireman?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Wings 'n' Things

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Porktastic

programme.desc: In the Outback, Jeremy Wade races to encounter a giant predator thought to be extinct, but is suspected to have reappeared in its deadly waters. In South Africa, Jeremy hopes to rendezvous with a deadly human-fish hybrid with a fearsome reputation.

programme.desc: Jeremy returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to investigate a pack-hunting carnivore blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. This time, he decides to put on his dive gear and offer himself as live bait in croc-infested waters.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Rare Egg

programme.title: The Zoo: Cougar Cub Rescue

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Smith
programme.desc: When the half-dressed, partially frozen body of a Navy veteran is found lying in a ditch, rumors and lies will challenge detectives' efforts to lay bare the truth behind the chilling death.

programme.title: Snapped: Karina Rafter
programme.desc: While investigating the tragic murder of a devoted father in Virginia, detectives must work their way through several disturbing theories and contentious family dynamics to get to the heart-breaking truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Tonya Ford
programme.desc: A popular police officer is killed, and the motive may be payback — by a woman scorned.

programme.title: Snapped: Teresa Stone
programme.desc: A secret affair between a woman and her church’s pastor becomes public when they become suspects in a murder.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Genius Murder
programme.desc: When a brilliant scientist and devoted family man is found beaten to death, the evidence leads police to make arrests, but an astounding revelation turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: Framed by the Killer: The Family Man and the Frame
programme.desc: After a husband is found guilty of murdering his wife and kids, a decade long battle slowly unravels the truth behind this dark crime and the framing that costs a man his freedom.

programme.title: Snapped: Jennifer Nibbe
programme.desc: A wife claims an intruder killed her husband, but the real mystery turns out to be the couple's secret lives.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Up in Flames
programme.desc: Brett and Vashti were high school sweethearts now busy raising two boys. Then a fire ripped through their home. In the ashes, investigators found a mystery. What happened that night was no accident.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Jessica Nelson was a hardworking single mom. Then, one morning, she was found dead in her home. The discovery left her family shattered and their ordeal had just begun. Turns out, the killer was someone they knew.

programme.title: The Case Died With Her
programme.desc: Loni Coombs investigates the case of Emilie Morris, a former star high school athlete whose coach confesses on tape to an inappropriate relationship. When Emilie is found dead before an important hearing, the case dies with her over a legal loophole.

programme.title: Snapped: Barbara Cameron
programme.desc: Death hits close to home when a Mississippi father of four is brutally killed on his own front porch. Soon a mother and son turn against one another as detectives work to untangle a murky tale of "he said she said" to close in on a killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Celestine Payne
programme.desc: The identity of a Jane Doe found dead in a New Jersey park holds the key to unravelling a tangled web of fraud and murder that spanned years and pulled in multiple victims along the way.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets on the Emerald Coast
programme.desc: A young mother disappears after leaving her infant in the care of a local pastor and his wife. Florida detectives search for five years and uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Twisted in Texas
programme.desc: When a woman breaks off a relationship with a boyfriend who abused and stalked, he goes on to do something worse. His accused accomplice is his new girlfriend.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Musclehead Murders
programme.desc: A wealthy Miami couple disappears leaving an abandoned Lamborghini. Police are perplexed until a rich businessman comes forward with a bizarre and torturous tale of a group of muscled men looking for a fast way to flashy cars and a fabulous lifestyle.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Killer Succession
programme.desc: A car bomb explodes rocking the millionaire enclave of Naples, Florida. Tobacco heiress Margaret Benson and her son are victims of a double homicide. Her severely injured daughter clings to life, and may be the police’s only hope for an eyewitness.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Murder in the Keys
programme.desc: Young newlyweds Michael and Susan 'Missy' MacIvor were living the dream in the Florida Keys with a baby on the way. But the Florida Man strikes in paradise, when under the cover of a storm, the MacIvors become victims of a triple homicide.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Dial 911 for Murder
programme.desc: 21 year-old hopeful romantic, Landy Martinez, is caught in a tumultuous and deadly love triangle. At the scene of the crime is a cell phone with the victim on video pleading for his life. Can the police unlock the evidence to convict the killer?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on the Emerald Coast
programme.desc: Marie Carlson was radiant but behind the glow she hid a darkness. For a while, Marie drifted but, then, a pastor and his wife welcomed her into their lives. It was a spiritual awakening which made Marie's disappearance all the more mysterious.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Something Wicked
programme.desc: Skylar Neese was everything her parents hoped for, but their world turned upside down when she vanished without a trace. At first, police thought she ran away but hints on social media pointed to a more sinister reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unimaginable
programme.desc: The case made national headlines: A toddler left in the car for seven hours while his dad was at work. Was this a heartbreaking accident? Police said it was murder. Could any parent ever do this on purpose?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayed
programme.desc: Melissa Lewis disappeared leaving signs of a struggle and a strange orange mist behind her. Later, her boss went missing and left behind an even bigger mess, including a missing fortune. Two crimes leaving one lingering mystery.

programme.title: Movie: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: The Channel 4 news team reunites to helm a 24 hour news channel, but they have some stiff competition.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Devil Wears Nada
programme.desc: In an effort to raise money for charity, Marge and 'Philanthro-Chicks' decide to pose for a calendar. At the photo studio, Marge is reluctant to reveal skin, but the photographer loosens her up with wine and, before long, Marge is the talk of the town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pranks and Greens
programme.desc: Fed up with Bart's constant pranks, Principal Skinner tells Bart that there is a former Springfield Elementary student hailed as the best prankster ever. Bart tracks down the prankster and they become fast friends until Bart gets him a job.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rednecks and Broomsticks
programme.desc: After getting lost in a game of hide-and-seek, Lisa wanders into the field and discovers three teenage girls who are practicing Wiccans. Just before Lisa joins them, Chief Wiggum arrests the three girls for witchcraft and Lisa becomes the trial witness.

programme.title: The Simpsons: O Brother, Where Bart Thou
programme.desc: One snowy day in Springfield, Lisa informs Bart that she and Maggie share a bond that Bart will never understand because he doesn't have a brother, so Bart asks Homer for a baby brother. When Homer turns him down, Bart heads to the orphanage.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thursdays With Abie
programme.desc: Grampa is sitting on a bench waiting for his family when a man named Marshall Goldman approaches him and asks to hear about his life. Grampa tells Goldman about the time he was on a battleship, which was hit by an enemy torpedo.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Krusty is approached by two network executives who want to bring in a female co-star to increase the show's female demographic. The rapport between Krusty and Princess Penelope grows, and before long, Krusty proposes to her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Million Dollar Maybe
programme.desc: Homer blows off Marge to buy a lottery ticket and winds up winning the million-dollar jackpot. Fearing how Marge will react if she finds out why Homer missed their date, Homer keeps his newly inherited fortune a secret until Bart finds out.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Boy Meets Curl
programme.desc: The Simpsons head to the 2010 Vancouver Games. Marge and Homer take up curling and end up competing in the Olympic trials. Meanwhile, Lisa becomes hopelessly addicted to collecting Olympic pins.

programme.desc: When Bart fails to turn in his homework, Mrs. Krabappel sends a letter home about Bart's behaviour. Despite Bart's best efforts to intercept it, Homer reads the letter, and he and Marge visit Principal Skinner for a parent-teacher conference.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Stealing First Base
programme.desc: Principal Skinner announces that Mrs. Krabappel was called out of town and budget cuts dictate that, until she returns, the school's two fourth grade classes will merge. Bart reluctantly shares a desk with Nikki and develops a flirtatious rapport.

programme.title: Movie: Casino Royale
programme.desc: On his first mission with 00 status, MI6 operative James Bond must stop Le Chiffre, a banker to the world's terrorist organizations, from winning a high-stakes poker tournament at Casino Royale.

programme.title: Movie: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: Bond and M discover a secret international power network after an assassination attempt on M. Bond, still sore about his lover's murder, goes rogue in search of a global conspiracy and the search for power over smaller countries.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef's size is revealed as a mosaic of environments. However, scale isn't the only success of this micro world. The reef exists in nutrient poor waters, which on the face of it, is too poor to support all this life.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Safari Babies
programme.desc: Young animals struggle to overcome challenges on the African savannah.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Water Babies
programme.desc: Many animals that live in water come on land to have their babies, and being born this way presents some major challenges for water babies to overcome.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Mountain Babies
programme.desc: Mountain Babies must battle the weather and hungry predators, and just getting around this environment is tough for youngsters. It's a huge adventure and all these trials must be overcome if they are to grow up to become successful adults.

programme.title: Wild India
programme.desc: India's Wild Karnataka follows some amazing creatures that live across this diverse land. Filmed over three years, dedicated camera teams have captured the wildlife of Karnataka as it has never been seen before.

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari
programme.desc: In Africa's ancient southwest corner, two deserts sit side by side; water is in short supply, yet these deserts are full of life because the creatures that live there have turned the rules of survival on their head.

programme.title: Inside the SS: Hitler's Killing Machine

programme.title: Hitler the Junkie

programme.title: Hitler's Last Year

programme.title: Hitler Youth: Nazi Child Soldiers

programme.title: Inside the SS

programme.title: Forbidden History: Top Secret Nazi UFOs
programme.desc: Investigating claims that the Nazis had developed a brand new flying craft at a secret research facility in Northern Germany and that the Americans and Russians stole this technology after the war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls: New Evidence
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Deadly Dynamics
programme.desc: A brutal murder is committed in front of the Hattenbrun home, and police must focus on several family members to catch the sadistic killer. Before long, they discover a shocking truth that no one thought possible.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike finds a potential investment for Michael and himself, but the property is three-and-a-half hours away on St. Lawrence River. Things get even trickier as structural issues accumulate, causing stress levels to rise and the budget to go off the rails.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike throws Michael a curveball that has major consequences for their business partnership. The rebuild of the River House continues as they battle muck, rain and snow, and after many stressful months, the property is ready to be revealed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Mary Poppins

programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!
programme.desc: The kids pair off to find the missing pieces of a mystical sword hidden throughout an Istanboar marketplace, unless F.O.W.L. gets to them first.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 must continue to fight off a city overrun with monsters.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Old Man and the Goose
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Best Thing Since Slice Bread
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Gym Dandy/ Detained
programme.desc: Kick tries out for the school's sports teams, but causes chaos when he has trouble following Coach Sternbeck's rules. Then, Kick must team up with some unlikely allies to bring down the new Vice Principal and escape detention.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Obsession: For Kick/ Flush and Release
programme.desc: Gunther tries to convince Kick that a girl named Jackie is becoming more than his biggest fan. Kick learns about a legendary giant goldfish roaming the waters of the flood Gully.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Sleepy River Wild/ Power Play
programme.desc: Gunther falls asleep on a waterpark ride/ Kick tries to get out of playing Romeo.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Snowpolcalypse!/ According to Chimp
programme.desc: Kick causes the school bus to get trapped during a blizzard. Later, Kick brings home a lost chimp named Dr. Awesome and makes it his new pet. Kick soon realizes that the apparently cute little primate becomes destructive without chocolate bananas.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kart to Kart/ Kyle 2.0
programme.desc: When Gordie Gibble buys Mellowbrook's go-kart track, he bans the Buttowskis. Kick spends time with cousin Kyle in order to score tickets to Dirk Bike Mike's Demo-Cross.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Stumped Again/ The Kick Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Kick must choose between helping his idol Billy Stumps in a monster truck show and helping his best friend Gunther with an important Viking coming-of-age ritual. Kick teams up with Jackie to take a photo for a billboard contest.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: For the Love of Gunther/ Father From the Truth
programme.desc: Kick trains his best friend to be a stuntman when Gunther reveals he has a crush.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Those Who Camp, Do/ Dog Gone
programme.desc: Brad decides to tag along when Kick vows to spend a night in the untamed wilderness and make it out alive. Later, Kick must track down a ferocious devil dog before Mrs. Chicarelly gets home and gets him grounded for life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Mellowbrook Drift/ Gift of Wacky
programme.desc: Kick challenges the physics nerd bully to a winner-takes-all, gravity-defying race.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Morning Rush/ A Fistful of Ice Cream
programme.desc: In order to not fail the school year, Kick has one night to complete all of his missed homework assignments; To give his dad the best birthday gift ever, Kick tracks down a rare ice cream treat.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Runaway Recital/ Trike X-5
programme.desc: Kick's dad forces him to learn the piano, but Kick decides to turn it into a stunt that spans the whole town. Kick's sister steals his first stunt bike and turns it into a girly bike.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Trash Talk/ Nerves of Steal
programme.desc: When Kick is caught littering, he is assigned highway clean-up duty, but finds keeping a stretch of highway litter-free more difficult than he thought when up against Chuck Glarman, a pesky rival who is determined to have the cleanest stretch.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Clean... to the Extreme/ Stand and Delivery
programme.desc: Kick accidentally breaks Gunther's dad's foosball table and must complete a series of favours to replace it before Gunther's dad gets home. Kick takes over the delivery services at Battlesnax and must defend delivery guarantee.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kickasaurus Wrecks/ Battle for the 'Snax
programme.desc: Kick is forced into a shrimp costume after being hired to perform during the halftime show for a local football team. Gunther's parents are forced to sell their beloved restaurant and move back to the old country unless Kick can help them get customers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Baljeatles/ Vanessassary Roughness
programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sipping With the Enemy/ Tri-State Treasure: Boot of Secrets
programme.desc: Candace tries to bust Phineas and Ferb when they put on an enormous backyard magic show. Vanessa and Major Monogram's son, Monty, get coffee together.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Night of the Living Pharmacists
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' accidentally turns the citizens of Danville into contagious Doof-zombies who run rampant all over town. Agent P and the kids must work together to save Danville and avoid becoming Doof-zombies themselves.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Final Hand!
programme.desc: In the Bey Carnival semifinals, Dante clashes with Joe while Fumiya goes up against Lodin; the battles have never been wilder and the stakes have never been higher!

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Shining Bright! Hyper-Flux!
Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The New Nega-Globby / De-Based
programme.desc: Globby and Honey Lemon feel guilty about Nega-Globby being trapped in the Glop-Vac. Basemax gets infected with a virus from a spam email.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Movie: Two for the Win

programme.title: Movie: Snowkissed

programme.title: Movie: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A woman accidentally catches a wedding bouquet before her engaged friend. She is then reminded of a family myth that puts her friend’s happiness at stake.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: The Wealthy Widow

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Humans, Monkeys and Rats, Oh Thai!
programme.desc: A workaholic mom and a loner are challenged to survive three weeks in Thailand. Competing with monkeys and rats for food, it's a daily struggle not only to survive, but to understand each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Deserted and Dehydrated
programme.desc: A hunter from Louisiana meets a surfer girl on a deserted island of the Philippines. With very little water to tap into, dehydration soon sets in and the duo spends most of their time securing a water source.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Swamp Survival
programme.desc: An Army mom and a Marine are shipped out to the swamps of the Florida Everglades where they will put their military survival training to the test, facing alligators, venomous water moccasins and mosquitoes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Beating Heart 'Bama
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed 'King of the forest' and an endurance athlete take on the Alabama backwoods. They secure shelter and fire, but once hunger kicks in it pushes one of them to do something we've never seen before.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Madness in Madagascar
programme.desc: Two survivalists journey to the most hostile environment on the planet to take on the Amazon without modern conveniences or clothing. They attempt to survive while battling piranhas, jaguars, and mosquitoes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Savannah Slam
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on Guyana's equatorial savannah. Slammed by the heat, they battle debilitating health issues, a team dynamic breakdown, critical survival malfunctions and a massive psychological decline.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Sick as a Skunk
programme.desc: After a typhoon scatters debris through a Philippine forest, a stay-at-home mom and stubborn trucker try to survive there. Combating sickness and no food, they come together and ward off hunger by eating a skunk.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Cuddle Clash
programme.desc: An ex-cop and a self-described wild child clash over cuddling in the Panamanian jungle. When the challenge overwhelms one of them, the other must forage, trap and even kill to keep a glimmer of hope alive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Mismatch in the Mountains
programme.desc: An Army vet and a newly married man grapple with gender norms in the mountains of Croatia. Hunger and frigid temperatures force this unlikely pair to bond together, but a storm threatens to rip them apart.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Flood and Fauna
programme.desc: A surfer and an Ex-Military take on the Texas countryside, surrounded by Armadillo, big horn sheep and vicious wild boar. As they battle starvation and face a potentially fatal flood, their skills will be tested.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: The Haunting
programme.desc: Jeremy and Melanie continue the hardest challenge of their lives in the haunted swamps of Louisiana. They must endure constant threats from predators, while desperately trying to secure food to keep them going.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Swamp Redemption
programme.desc: Jeremy, a former Naked and Afraid survivalist, returns for his chance at redemption in the haunted swamps of Louisiana and is joined by Michelle, an Air Force veteran. Trouble hits the partnership early on.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: d+ Sneak Peek: Ticked Off
programme.desc: Naked survivalists are challenged to survive in harsh and dangerous environments.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Raiders of the Holy Grail

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Controlled Fire, Car Chase
programme.desc: A fire explodes and disaster comes from a police chase.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: The Fishing Machine
programme.desc: YouTube star Richard Gene the Fishing Machine joins Jimmy for bass fishing.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Salmon on Restigouche River
programme.desc: We're chasing Atlantic Salmon on Canada's Restigouche River.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Porsche Collision, Refinery Explosion
programme.desc: Two Porches collide at triple digit speeds; a massive explosion sets off a shockwave; a torrent of water explodes through a storm wall.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Post-Storm Fortune
programme.desc: Smiling Bob's Fish Dip and Tonio's Seafood Shack and Tiki Bar are visited.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Josh Holubz
programme.desc: An Army veterans shares how he left his newborn daughter and was severely wounded by a machine gun in Iraq.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Fort Myers, Florida - After Hours Snapper
programme.desc: George fishes for snapper around a wreck off Fort Myers.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Everglades City Snook
programme.desc: Rick's son Collin joins him for snook fishing in 'The Gateway to the Ten Thousand Islands.'

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: You've Got Another Sting Coming
programme.desc: On a sun-scorched Brazilian island, aggressive anaconda and deadly stingray torment survivalists Whitney and Nathan, pushing both of them to their breaking point. Working together, they use their hunting and fishing skills to try and make it 21 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Twinning
programme.desc: In an unprecedented Naked and Afraid challenge, identical twin sisters Amber and Serena, as well as brothers Warren and Thomas, are dropped in the African savannah. They take on rhinos, hyenas and a territorial leopard stalking their camp.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Category Five Survival
programme.desc: A category five hurricane blasts through the camp of Amal, an Iraqi war refugee now living in Iowa and her partner, Duke. In addition to the hurricane, the pair also endures venomous spiders, insects, and nocturnal predators in the swamps of Florida.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Two survivalists are dropped on a deserted Fijian island. They must battle the elements, as well as each other’s annoyances, as they try to survive 21 days together. With blistering heat, minimal water and scarce food, this will be no honeymoon.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A biology student and an expert survival instructor team up on the swampy shore of Croatia. A strong partnership is forged through braving the elements and facing their demons, but takes a turn for the worst with a freak accident.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Frozen and Afraid
programme.desc: Dropped onto a frozen Alaskan glacier, all-star survivalists Laura Zerra and Steven Hall scramble to stave off frostbite and hypothermia. Later, 7,000 miles south, two new survivalists take on a sun-scorched Brazil island, with anaconda and stingray.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Leave It to Nevus
programme.desc: With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Monica has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. Jackie has a melon-sized lump on the back of her shoulder. Reginald has large, rare growths on the back of his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Don't Sweat It!
programme.desc: Audrey pops the painful bumps that cover her body so she can feel relief. Felicia has a peculiar looking dark growth on her forehead. Krista's excessive sweating is so severe that on any given day she could fill up an entire milk jug with her sweat.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley B's Story
programme.desc: At 600lbs, Ashley had to move home so her mom could help her care for not just herself but her newborn daughter too. Now Ashley must overcome a lifetime's worth of unfortunate circumstances and get Dr. Now's help in Houston to find a way to go on living.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Cindy's Story
programme.desc: Cindy is resistant to change and has spent years creating a world that makes her feel safe. When her friend notices Cindy's health declining rapidly due to her size, she pushes Cindy to move to Houston and see Dr. Now. But Cindy isn't so easily persuaded.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: A Fork in the Road
programme.desc: The Slatons are shocked by the cause of Amy's trip to the emergency room. Chris and Tammy see a new doctor, where Tammy must step on the scale again after a month of not sticking to her diet.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Milla's Story
programme.desc: At 700 lbs., Milla is bedridden and dependent on her husband and five kids. Terrified that each day will be her last, they still can't resist her unending requests for junk food.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Cindy's Story
programme.desc: Cindy is resistant to change and has spent years creating a world that makes her feel safe. When her friend notices Cindy's health declining rapidly due to her size, she pushes Cindy to move to Houston and see Dr. Now. But Cindy isn't so easily persuaded.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: A Fork in the Road
programme.desc: The Slatons are shocked by the cause of Amy's trip to the emergency room. Chris and Tammy see a new doctor, where Tammy must step on the scale again after a month of not sticking to her diet.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Milla's Story
programme.desc: At 700 lbs., Milla is bedridden and dependent on her husband and five kids. Terrified that each day will be her last, they still can't resist her unending requests for junk food.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Oh My God! Welcome to My Home!
programme.desc: Randy officially kicks off his 'SAY YES AMERICA' tour. When he shows up at unsuspecting Katie's front door she gets the shock of her life. Bride Dana wants to flash her tats on the wedding day but her conservative entourage won't go down without a fight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: America Coming Together
programme.desc: After putting on the wedding of a lifetime, Randy and Hayley sit down at Kleinfeld to reminisce on some of the fun, emotional moments of the season including some never before seen footage.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Persia has flown from L.A. in search of a $14K Pnina dress, but no one can locate it. Katrice's two brothers, NFL stars Thomas and Julius Jones, secretly plan to purchase her gown. Fitting bride Brittany is shocked by an unwanted addition to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Entourage Sabotage
programme.desc: Sometimes, a bride's entourage is bossy instead of helpful. Tenisha wants lots of bling, but her bridesmaids insist on other styles. Elyse's mom demands she try on a pink ball gown. Adriana's family argues over the length of her hem.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Dress like None the Rest
programme.desc: Broadway star Sutton Foster hunts for a dress to top all the other dresses she's worn. Wedding dress model Lauren fears she has worn too many gowns to find one that feels special. Hope is renewing her vows and this time she wants to wear her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Seal of Approval
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to look like a 'sex kitten' on her big day, but her mom wishes for something modest. Second-time bride Lisa's mother is very opinionated about her dress choices. Elizabeth fears her mom won't approve the $13K gown she bought without her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: Former model Meghan flew from St. Louis to find the perfect dress for her wedding to MLB star Jim Edmonds. Picky fashion buyer Lauren is back for her second visit. GMA meteorologist Ginger Zee tries on her reconstructed Pnina gown for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Top My Dream Dress!
programme.desc: Three brides hope Kleinfeld can top the dream dresses they've already found. Lucille found a satin dress, but still wants more bling. Dana is head-over-heels for a tulle gown her mom hates. Joan loves a dress back home but wants one unique to Kleinfeld.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sample Sale Madness!
programme.desc: It's shopping chaos at Kleinfeld's blow-out sale! Danielle and Kathryn want the same gown- but there's only one and Jessica is in search of one very specific dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dazed and Gown-fused
programme.desc: Bride Nicole comes in with a very specific style of dress in mind, but discovers it may not suit her. Indecisive Katy has already tried on 50 gowns elsewhere and still doesn't know what she wants. Cy can't choose between two perfect dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Quest for Perfection
programme.desc: Actress Laurel is on tour with the musical 'Wicked,' and she wants a dress that doesn't resemble her stage costumes. Picky bride Kea has already tried on more than 100 dresses! Mackenzie worries her beach dress will be too short to cover her bare feet.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: When in Doubt, Customize
programme.desc: Host Courtney Cason only wants a Mark Zunino gown, and she gets a huge surprise at Kleinfeld. Zabrina looks for an extravagant ball gown for her Near Year's Eve wedding, and Cheryl is nervous to try on her custom dress because she has never seen it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Thorn in the Bride's Side
programme.desc: Miss USA Erin Brady is ready to find her dream dress, but she must also please her mother-in-law.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dueling Visions
programme.desc: Kristin is torn between looking sexy or traditional. Alexa also wants a dress with sex appeal, but she needs to please her conservative dad. Diana can't decide between a flowy or structured gown.

programme.title: Unexpected: Kids Having Kids
programme.desc: A pregnant Jenna wants a car for her birthday. Myrka's mom kicked her out for getting pregnant. Soon-to-be-grandma Jessica tries to salvage the relationship between teens Reanna and Taron. Tyra leaves Alex and Layla behind at home as she heads to college.

programme.title: Unexpected: Worst. Birthday. EVER.
programme.desc: Jenna only wanted one thing for her birthday: a car. Away at college, Tyra receives devastating news. Taron and Reanna accuse each other of cheating weeks before she is due. Myrka and Ethan get an ultrasound, but no one gets to know the baby's gender yet.

programme.title: Unexpected: Invitation to the Gender Reveal
programme.desc: Jessica worries Reanna may be going into early labor. Tyra is furious that Julie's internet boyfriend has moved in. Myrka invites her mom to her gender reveal party. Jenna refuses to move her pet rabbit's cage to make room for a new crib.

programme.title: Unexpected: Catching Up With Hailey 1
programme.desc: Tiarra hears the Matthew drama when she gets together with Hailey. Taron threatens to take Reanna to court to see his baby. Myrka and Ethan prepare for an extravagant gender reveal party. Jenna's dad refuses to let her mom be a part of the baby shower.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Crashers

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers

programme.title: Movie: Old School

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Frostbite and Bears
programme.desc: Looking at how to survive pursuit by a wild bear and being trapped in a sinking car. Real-life footage tests your instincts against wildfires, frostbite, extreme fog and treacherous underwater currents.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Gators and Ice Tsunami
programme.desc: What would you do if a wall of ice threatened to crush your home? Could you cope being trapped in an elevator? Incredible video pits you against deadly black ice, intense sandstorms, and hungry alligators!

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary Lynn
programme.desc: Mary Lynn's 14 year-old-son Jacob would rather be in foster care than live with his own mother in her hoarded house. He fabricated a story about his mother beating him as a means of getting CPS involved. If she doesn't progress, she could lose her son.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dorothy and David and Doris
programme.desc: Dorothy and David fell in love with each other over their mutual love of hoarding. Their home is so packed now it has become physically unsafe for Dorothy, and doctors have said one more fall in the hoard could paralyze her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ruby and Mary
programme.desc: Ruby's house is so hoarded she spends her entire day living in the car, and her grandson has started running the streets of LA.

programme.title: Hoarders: Judy
programme.desc: Judy's life is a dangerous one of severe contradictions. She is an extreme germaphobe who spends her entire day engaged in sanitization rituals, yet she lives in a severe and extremely filthy hoard overridden with mice that she considers her friends.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sybil and Ron
programme.desc: Sybil's hoard is so intense that mice have started to live in her tub and her refrigerator. Ron has hoarded out his camera shop to the point where he has lost many of his customers.

programme.title: Movie: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A singer-turned-actress falls in love with her bodyguard while being stalked by a fan.

programme.title: Movie: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A doctor who was wrongly convicted of murdering his wife escapes and goes in search of the real killer to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Breakfast Foods Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys for another fun glimpse at their lives direct from their home. The fans decide what's on tonight's menu.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Halloween Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a Halloween-themed party and surprise each other with elaborate costumes. They're joined by Kane Hodder, aka Jason Voorhees.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: A Glittery Shoe
programme.desc: Sean Patton, Casey James Salengo, and Mehran Khaghani perform.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Losers Special
programme.desc: Dave Hill, Tone Bell, and Julian McCullough compete to finally earn a win or at least avoid the dreaded apology.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer gets crazy eyes, Noah Gardenswartz knows what not to say during brain surgery, and Clayton English is convinced that a major pop star is watching him.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Show Some Respect
programme.desc: Dave Hill confesses who he has on the brain, J.P. McDale tales a shot at Dave's career, and Ali Kolbert reveals her side hustle.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes
programme.desc: In this special episode, Michael gives a fresh look to your favourite tricks with never-before-seen footage. From the arcade to the science lab, Michael revisits classic moments with footage from the cutting room floor.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Two
programme.desc: In this special, a trip down memory lane turns trippy when Michael revisits classic bits, including the hallucinogenic frog and the glue-sniffing mishap, to unlock never-before-seen reactions to your favorite jaw-dropping tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Three
programme.desc: In this special, Michael revisits some of the spookiest bits of Carbonaro past to reveal fresh frights with never-before-seen reactions to tricks, including the alien abduction, musical ghosts and mad science experiments gone wrong.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Four
programme.desc: Michael takes viewers behind the scenes and shows them never seen tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Ridiculous Antics
programme.desc: TruTV’s Top Funniest splits your sides with the most hilarious videos from across the globe. Watch as a baby elephant gets frisky with the visitors at the zoo, and see what happens when a dad decides to jump into a frozen pool.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Blunders
programme.desc: Watch as DIYers deliver laughs in this collection of home improvement show bloopers. Plus, an amateur stuntman jumps from a moving car but misses his landing. Then, a prankster scares folks with a terrifying spider surprise.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Surprise Laughs
programme.desc: The most hilarious blunders, jokes, pranks, and fails. See what happens when a show-off tries to slide down the railing of an escalator. Then, check out the beachgoer who taunts Mother Nature and incurs the wrath of the sea.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Moments of Regret
programme.desc: Watch celebrity look-a-likes run amok on an unsuspecting public. Plus, a painful tribute to those moments that may you say 'ow!'

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Compromised Agent
programme.desc: The NSA Interns uncover insane videos, including a man who tests homemade chloroform on himself and a massive wedding fail. Plus, the interns investigate a rogue agent's social media.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Film Fail
programme.desc: Learn why the Joker film in the produce section of grocery stores, what the guys tease Murr about and why the audio team had issues recording in a medical office.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Alliance
programme.desc: Find out which Joker is an avid photographer, and what words the guys never want to hear before filming a punishment. Plus, learn which Joker is never afraid to strip down for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Enter the Dragons
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's dad has appeared on the show, and which natural disaster affected one of the challenges. Plus, learn how Sal came to own a replica of Van Halen's guitar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: Find out which Joker brought a kitten to the set, and who's responsible for the song used on the show. Plus, learn which instrument Q tried to master before the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Find out why Murr is particular about the way labels face in grocery stores, how Sal always gets Joe to break character and who works out with a personal trainer.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart becomes 'the face of the FBI' when her popularity botches a mission. When her friend, Miss USA, is kidnapped, Gracie decides to defy her superiors' orders and investigates the case on her own.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Titanic Treats
programme.desc: From monster sushi rolls and a five-layer pizza cake to Texas-sized cinnamon rolls and a towering pancake sundae, these dining hot spots are bursting at the seams with titanic treats.

programme.title: Food Paradise: At the Drive-In
programme.desc: From crispy, juicy fried chicken and hearty chili cheese fries to zesty taco burgers and deep-fried hot dogs, diners are pulling up for a taste of Americana.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Day Dining
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy gets a taste of every meal. In Long Beach, California, he's served some delicious short ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin' In Beantown
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is in Beantown for an all-Boston smorgasbord. Just outside the city in Allston, two restaurants share an open kitchen but have completely different menus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing sandwiches, spice and everything nice, starting with lights-out lamb in Fargo, ND. A funky spot in Sioux Falls, SD, is loading up hand-held flavor bombs, and, in Fairbanks, AK, a wild pizza place is making spicy, sweet pies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Southern and South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into sandwiches, Southern eats and south-of-the-border specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Finger Lickin' Chicken
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is chickening out across the country, from a sandwich shop outside Boston to a Filipino favourite in Los Angeles. Plus, a joint in Cleveland brings Guy's catchphrase to life with the Winner Winner Chicken Dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Hand and By Fork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into dynamite dishes and grabbin' some outrageous grub.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck serves its pork fusion on loaded platters and Central American arepas. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint tucked away in a grocery store dishes out barbecued pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Standards to Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up all kinds of joints, from classic Italian to Modern Americana. In Jackson, a California chef is bringing his brand of Mexican to the mountains.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Football, Friends and Comfort Food
programme.desc: Trisha has her girlfriends over for their Sunday tradition of football, food, and friends. The menu includes sausage hors d'oeuvres, cheese dip with corn chips, chilli with sour cream corn bread and green punch.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Feeding The Home Team
programme.desc: Trisha presents recipes that are perfect for a large gathering.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: 4th Down and Yum
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli hosts a football-themed party with former NFL pro and Food Network Star, Eddie Jackson. The touchdown-worthy menu includes slow cooker sloppy Joe sliders, homemade potato chips topped with chicken salt, and roasted carrot hummus.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Touchdown!
programme.desc: Valerie kicks off football season with white chicken chili and toppings bar, a football cheese ball with herbed crackers, green salad with champagne vinaigrette, toffee buckeyes and a bloody bull cocktail with a spicy pickled okra and green bean garnish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Skillet Stories
programme.desc: The sky's the skillet as Ree Drummond opens up her book of skillet stories, cooking up new dishes in trusty pans while her kids join her to film. Her menu includes a strawberry almond pan cake, breakfast totchos and tortellini puttanesca.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Truly Madly Crazy
programme.desc: Ree cooks up some crazy, fun ideas for game night food. There's a whole new take on a football favorite with pull-apart Pizza Rolls, then over-the-top Hawaiian burgers piled high with grilled pineapple.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Tuesday Night Lights
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a family dinner with her son Todd's favorite foods to celebrate his football team taking on their rivals. She prepares cheesesteak paninis and homemade cheese sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: College Rivals
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares awesome football food inspired by her college rival daughters.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Fondue Party
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's sister is visiting, so Molly's taking her snowshoeing- with treats, of course! They snack on pistachio white chocolates and beef and rutabaga hand pies with jalapeno ketchup.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Open House Tailgate
programme.desc: Trisha prepares some tasty treats including a giant hoagie, sweet tots, loaded pizza dip and dessert nachos for a tailgate at her house. Plus, pro football player DeMarco Murray swings by!

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Ladies Who Lunch
programme.desc: Kardea Brown makes a fancy light lunch for her friend Nancy Fuller. The menu includes an assortment of southern tea sandwiches, a lowcountry charcuterie board featuring buffalo blue pimiento cheese and key lime pie tartlets.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Southern Table
programme.desc: Kardea Brown is cooking up the perfect Lowcountry meal for her new Southern table: fried chicken with hot honey sauce, hoppin' John and sautéed green beans with garlic and pepper.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Try Something New
programme.desc: Everyone's trying something new in the kitchen, starting with Jeff Mauro's flavourful hot cheese crunchy mac and cheese. The hosts share new tricks, including Katie Lee's easy two-ingredient cupcake. Then, Geoffrey experiments with Wok Egg Foo Young.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Parking Lot Party
programme.desc: Four feisty chefs rustle up ingredients from supermarket shoppers to create perfect party snacks. Then, there's nothing better for the after party than a hearty breakfast, and it's a mad dash to the finish as the chefs prepare dueling decadent desserts.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Winner Winter Games
programme.desc: It's cold outside, but the competition is heating up in Flavortown Market as Guy Fieri welcomes back three previous GGG winners to compete in his winter-themed games.

programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.
