programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Refund
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin unsuccessfully attempt to get a refund for their computer game.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Goons
programme.desc: Gumball sets out to win his Dad back by winning a blindfolded 'dumb' race.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sock
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are taught confusing lessons about honesty by the school councillor.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Genius
programme.desc: Darwin is sent away to a government institute for geniuses.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Bumpkin
programme.desc: Envious of his rustic lifestyle, Gumball invites Idaho over to teach the Wattersons how to live like a potato.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Pony
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin race home to spend quality time with Anais, but every likely obstacle gets in way, along some unlikely ones too!

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Hero
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are determined to prove to their dad that he is their hero, at any cost.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Tag
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin get caught in the middle of Dad and Mr Robinson’s trash-can feud.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Lie
programme.desc: Gumball and Anais create a new holiday to cheer people up during January.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Butterfly
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin release a butterfly that just emerged from its chrysalis, and it wreaks havoc all over town.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Question
programme.desc: The adventures of a blue cat named Gumball and his buddy Darwin, a goldfish with legs.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Saint
programme.desc: Gumball doesn’t believe that anyone could really be as nice as Alan and sets out to find his breaking point. Alan is so good-natured that Gumball feels compelled to make him lose his temper.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Downer
programme.desc: Gumball is in a funk that is proving hard to shake. Gumball refuses to get out of bed because he is in a lousy mood. When his family try to cheer him up Gumball wishes they’d all just disappear.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Crew
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin attempt to join the baddest crew in town.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Signature
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Dad tries to stop Granny Jojo getting married.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sale
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin do everything they can to stop Mr. Robinson selling his house.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Parking
programme.desc: It takes the Wattersons a little longer than they thought it would to find the perfect parking space at the mall.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Uploads
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin try to tear themselves away from the internet, but end up falling down the Elmore Stream-hole.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Singing
programme.desc: Mr Small feels that he hasn’t inspired the children of Elmore Junior High, so Gumball and Darwin try to lift his spirits.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Deal
programme.desc: Richard decides that his work around the house is underappreciated by Nicole and goes on strike to prove it.

programme.title: Roseanne: Mall Story
programme.desc: The Conner family spends the day together at the mall. Unfortunately, family time turns into a disaster when Roseanne and Becky disagree over a party dress, Darlene goes on a junk food binge, and Dan gets in a tight squeeze.

programme.title: Roseanne: Becky's Choice
programme.desc: Roseanne invites Chip and his parents over for a dinner party on the same night Becky has plans with her secret other boyfriend. Chip's family and the Conners come to blows in a battle of the classes.

programme.title: Roseanne: Slice of Life
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan fear the worst when Darlene is rushed to the hospital for an emergency appendectomy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Workin' Overtime
programme.desc: Roseanne's balancing act of motherhood and heavy overtime at work reaches a boiling point. Having been pushed to the edge, Roseanne runs away to a diner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. Walden, He Die. I Clean Room
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey's illicit affair puts Walden in danger, forcing him to accept Rose's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Numero Uno Accidente Lawyer
programme.desc: Walden's date with an accident-prone model goes longer than expected. Meanwhile, Alan dates a woman who shares some surprising personal information with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: On Vodka, on Soda, on Blender, on Mixer!
programme.desc: Walden helps Jenny get a second date with a one-night stand. Alan receives a Japanese delicacy from Jake for Christmas, and Walden's Malibu house is alive with questionable Christmas carol lyrics.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tazed in the Lady Nuts
programme.desc: Walden joins his beautiful former employee on a brilliant new project. Meanwhile, Alan advises Jenny to open up to her girlfriend or risk losing her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Baseball. Boobs. Boobs. Baseball.
programme.desc: Alan lets Lyndsey's boyfriend Larry set him up on a date. Meanwhile, Walden offers to help Nicole with her software project so she'll have time to date him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court
programme.desc: Walden and Alan throw Marty a bachelor party after he proposes to Evelyn, and his best friends help him celebrate his last days of bachelorhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Fingers of Crème de Menthe
programme.desc: Alan learns that Lyndsey broke up with Larry and didn't tell him. Meanwhile, Walden sets out to prove that he's a man's man.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cab Fare and a Bottle of Pencillin
programme.desc: Alan gives Lyndsey the option of choosing between him and Larry. Meanwhile, Jenny fears she and Brooke are growing apart.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: How to Get Rid of Alan Harper
programme.desc: Walden suspects his new girlfriend is cheating on him. Meanwhile, Alan gets even more intertwined in Lyndsey and Larry's relationship when he starts dating Larry's sister, Gretchen.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Welcome Home, Jake
programme.desc: Lyndsey discovers that Alan is sleeping with Larry's sister, Gretchen. Meanwhile, Walden struggles with telling Barry to find his own place.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Silent Mite
programme.desc: Doug is convinced that a 'little person' stole his wallet while he was out shopping.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Awed Couple
programme.desc: When Deacon and Kelly find new friends, Doug and Carrie must turn to their old friends.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cologne Ranger
programme.desc: Doug senses his manhood slipping away when Carrie forbids him to wear his new cologne.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: Doug is unhappy with Carrie's choice for a housekeeper so he hires Spence's mom, Veronica.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Tie Me Up, Don't Tie Me Down
programme.desc: Barb and Christine prepare for a casual, non-relationship-seeking double date, but jealousy arises when one date goes better than the other.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: So You Think You Can Date
programme.desc: Richard joins Christine and her new boyfriend, Patrick, on a dinner date.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Self-Esteem Tempura
programme.desc: Christine is thrilled when a talent scout recruits Ritchie to audition for a television commercial after his shockingly great performance in a school play but Richard refuses to let him go.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Rage Against the Christine
programme.desc: After Christine wins at tennis against her new boyfriend, he has a surprisingly odd reaction to her competitiveness.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Guess Who's Not Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: Christine cringes at her mother's constant disapproval but when she goes home for Thanksgiving, she's able to thwart one of her criticisms when she discovers a secret they have in common.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Unidentified Funk

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treading Water
programme.desc: Tania and Mariah make it their mission to help two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps. Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house. And a couple from New York are looking for a companion to share their active lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Arrivals
programme.desc: Tania races to rescue a mama dog clinging to life after being in labour for two days. A young woman comes to Villalobos looking for a roommate to share her new home with.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sisters in Rescue
programme.desc: When a 3-legged dog has trouble finding a forever home, Amanda Giese from Panda Paws Rescue comes to New Orleans to help. Parolee Troy shares some life changing news with Tia and the VRC crew. And, Villalobos helps an employee's dad find a new companion.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: You Are Free
programme.desc: Tania struggles to rescue a puppy that is hiding underneath a shed. A potential adopter comes to Villalobos hoping to find a companion for her dog, and she's only interested in seeing hounds. A beloved employee learns that he's finally off parole.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Saved from the Fight
programme.desc: Tia is called in to help rescue five injured dogs from a dog fighting situation. Parolee Spencer gets out of jail and returns to Villalobos. Tia asks Spencer to help out with an adoption to keep him on the straight and narrow.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl XVII Presents: Pupularity Playoffs: Week 4
Pit Bulls & Parolees: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: In the midst of the global pandemic, Tia and Mariah must shut down their beloved restaurant and boutique, but look to a new beginning. Meanwhile, a Villalobos senior canine veteran finally finds a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Match Made Perfect
programme.desc: Lizzy and Elise struggle to rescue a stray dog on the train tracks near the Villalobos warehouse. Mariah enlists help to get to the bottom of her dog Tater's nagging pain. A senior dog with a long medical history finally has her shot at a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: In the midst of the global pandemic, Tia and Mariah must shut down their beloved restaurant and boutique, but look to a new beginning. Meanwhile, a Villalobos senior canine veteran finally finds a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Tia goes on a dangerous midnight rescue that leads her to chasing down a dog's mysterious origins. A cat threatens the chances of a Villalobos veteran finding a forever home. Finally, a Parolee puts his neck out to help a friend get a job.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Risky Business
programme.desc: A former volunteer return in hopes of adopting a dog she fell in love with but her boxer threatens her chances. A parolee risks his freedom when he goes down the wrong path after being released from prison.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Good Gone Bad
programme.desc: Tia sends Mariah to California to rescue a former member of the VRC family. A puppy's behaviour puts her chances at a forever home at risk. After receiving a call about a pit bull, Tia jumps into action.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Broken Home
programme.desc: Tia and Matt are heartbroken when they are called to pick up some dogs whose owner has recently passed away. Then, a potential adopter is looking for a dog that will thrive in a B&B.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Midsummer Mayhem
programme.desc: Officer Holmes and trainee Frye respond to an ATV accident in which a man's head has been run over. Officer McKee helps relocate a rare rattlesnake. Officer Courtney assists a dog locked inside a car. On Mt. Willard, a collapsed student needs rescuing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Officer Canfield meets a feisty swimmer looking for a fight. Anger reaches a boiling point when Officers Pushee and McKee ticket a dozen unruly ATV violators at once. And as Officer McKee monitors a sleeping bear, it becomes dangerously aggravated.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have shot from the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Running Out of Time
programme.desc: The wardens, the National Guard, and dozens of volunteers team up in a massive, days-long search for a hiker missing in the vast wilderness of the White Mountains. And, the wardens take on some familiar faces in a charity softball game.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust
programme.desc: Down on the Mexican border, Game Wardens pull in an illegal gill net. A group caught trespassing is found with firearms and narcotics. In East Texas, Game Wardens question a man suspected of illegally hunting on private property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Encounters
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens relocate a large herd of pronghorn to restore populations in West Texas, investigate the killing of a protected rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull. Game Wardens check hunting camps to ensure no one's taking too many white-tail deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Bigfoot and Ghost Cave
programme.desc: A fishing trip changed David's life forever when he and his grandfather found themselves under attack by an unknown creature. Then, Zac and Lesla come across a cave in the woods and decide to head into the darkness where they encounter a violent entity.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Werewolf and Demon in the Woods

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: The Hell Hound
programme.desc: While exploring an abandoned hospital in Ohio, Amy encounters an uneasy presence in a cell and quickly flees from the building. Little does she know, the entity has latched onto her and stalks her to the woods surrounding her home.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Hunted by Bigfoot
programme.desc: Reports of Bigfoot in Ohio prompt two friends to go into the woods and investigate the claims. As they travel deeper into the forest, they hear strange howls. Suddenly, the sounds start to multiply and the hunters realize they are being hunted.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Haunted Cabin
programme.desc: Bill and Charisse purchased a little cabin in the middle of a national forest, but their idyllic retirement home quickly turned into their worst nightmare as Bill and Charisse are tormented by a paranormal spirit that once called their cabin home.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a fun-loving guy impregnates an up-and-coming entertainment journalist, they put their differences aside and take a shot at love.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a fun-loving guy impregnates an up-and-coming entertainment journalist, they put their differences aside and take a shot at love.

programme.desc: Kate, a successful businesswoman, learns that she is infertile when she decides that she can no longer wait for Mr. Right to have a baby. When she runs out of options, Kate hires an obnoxious surrogate to carry her baby.

programme.title: Summer House: Behind the Episode: Exes and Oh-No’s

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Bursting the Quarantine Bubble

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: You Dim Sum, You Lose Some

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Kary'd Away

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Whine Connoisseurs

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Porsha's Having a Baby: P is for Princess

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Porsha's Having a Baby: Grandmother Dearest

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: No Justice, No Peace

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: New Peach in the Orchard

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow

programme.title: Dead Silent: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: In a remote town in Oklahoma, Amanda Burney and her fiancée Ethan Walton are out running an errand that quickly becomes a run for their lives.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Open Season
programme.desc: On a frigid fall evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies, leading to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: 40 Years of Winter
programme.desc: After Christmas shopping, 18-year-old Linda Velzy vanishes into upstate New York's frozen landscape. The primary suspect refuses to talk to detectives, so Linda's father hatches a desperate plan. But temperatures are dropping and time is running out.

programme.title: Third Time's a Crime
programme.desc: In 1984, Glenna Kaye Catlin passes away after a month of intensive medical care. The cause of her fatal illness eludes California's finest doctors, but one woman is determined to prove that Glenna was murdered by a sinister killer who has gone undetected.

programme.title: Jeffrey Dahmer: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: With access to hundreds of pages of police and FBI interview transcripts and personal testimony from family, friends, and survivors, the haunting story of how Jeffrey Dahmer went from shy adolescent to a notorious serial killer and cannibal is revealed.

programme.desc: With access to hundreds of pages of police and FBI interview transcripts and personal testimony from family, friends, and survivors, the haunting story of how Jeffrey Dahmer went from shy adolescent to a notorious serial killer and cannibal is revealed.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Driven To Murder
programme.desc: After locals smell what can only be the scent of charred meat, police find burned remains in an abandoned mining pit in the small town of Hibbing, Minnesota. Before they can investigate who committed the crime, first they must identity the body.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When a young family suddenly vanishes from their Southern California dream home, friends and family are left with dozens of unanswered questions. Authorities suspect they fled the country, until an unlikely source uncovers the truth.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Love and Obsession
programme.desc: A New York socialite is terrorized by a sadistic stalker who threatens to kidnap her daughter.

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: Monster
programme.desc: A look at the life of Aileen Wuornos, America's first female serial killer and the woman Hollywood dubbed 'Monster.' In a never before seen interview, Aileen reveals intimate details of the love affair that led her to killer seven men.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Do No Harm
programme.desc: A man is driving home when he sees a woman being dragged down the street against her will. Another man is visiting his girlfriend at work on Valentine's Day when a robber leaps onto the counter. Both men take heroic action, ensuring no harm is done.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With Me
programme.desc: A mother is inside a gas station when a man steals her car, with her 13-year-old and 6-month old daughters inside. Then, when a waitress is sexually assaulted, she takes matters into her own hands, attacking her assaulter.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Fit of Rage
programme.desc: A former basketball star sentenced for abusing a girlfriend; an inmate shoots two deputies dead; a defendant throws chairs; a sex offender attacks a prosecutor; a man leapfrogs his way out of court; and a Rastafarian pot smoker lost in translation.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Trial by Violence
programme.desc: A father lunges at a serial killer; a defendant attempts to stab an attorney; an Alaskan wildlife enthusiast is tased; a daughter yells at her father's killer; a man threatens a female judge; a defendant walks out of his trial; a man lights up in court.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Clues Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A mother of three is gunned down in a church basement where she's set to teach a fitness class. Police find surveillance video showing a figure in full police body armor stalking the floor in the lead-up to the slaughter.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: John Doe 57
programme.desc: When a tip from a missing person’s network helps identify the body of a John Doe murder victim, investigators question the victim's family and friends to find the killer, and ultimately unravel a dark tale of betrayal.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: A loving mother is shot three times at a gas station in Memphis, Tennessee. As police search for clues, a mysterious letter threatens to complicate the already-tense relationship between local law enforcement and the community they've sworn to protect.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: The Silver Man
programme.desc: The Atlanta Homicide team is called to a crime scene when a body wrapped head to toe in silver tape is discovered at a church playground in an upscale Atlanta neighborhood. Once the victim's identity is unveiled, a twisted love triangle is revealed.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Stuck in a Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt for a pyromaniac with a fiery temper and a callous disregard for human life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: D is for Deadly
programme.desc: Dallas teen track star Shania Gray is left traumatized after being raped while babysitting. When a new Facebook friend offers support, she opens up to him.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: The Mafia's Black Sheep
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor the mob can't risk the fallout.

programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.
